beta_functions: SM QED/EW beta functions, declared order required before run
observable: alpha(M_Z) or alpha(0) depending declared comparison
forbidden_parameters: no extra charged fields, no fit exponent, no post-hoc threshold change
falsification_hook: fails if declared scheme running misses table outside stated uncertainty

scheme: on-shell pole mass or MSbar explicitly declared
beta_functions: QED/EW mass anomalous dimensions if running used
falsification_hook: fails if bridge requires new generation parameter

scheme: standard CKM convention declared before comparison
beta_functions: CKM running omitted or declared; if omitted compare convention-invariant quantities
threshold_conventions: quark mass scheme fixed before run
forbidden_parameters: no permutation after data, no hidden mass anchor
falsification_hook: fails if orientation must be changed after table comparison

beta_functions: QCD beta function declared by loop order
forbidden_parameters: no second QCD anchor, no hadron mass fit
falsification_hook: fails if matching requires new colored fields or extra scale
